pc_minimum.Processor: 4 hardware CPU threads - Intel® Core™ i5 750 or higher
pc_minimum.Graphics: Video card must be 1 GB or more and should be a DirectX 11-compatible with support for Shader Model 5.0

mac_minimum.Processor: Intel Core Duo Processor (2GHz or better)
mac_minimum.Graphics: ATI Radeon HD 2400 or better / NVIDIA 8600M or better

linux_minimum.Processor: 4 hardware CPU threads - Intel® Core™ i5 750 or higher
linux_minimum.Graphics: AMD GCN+ or NVIDIA Kepler+ with up-to-date Vulkan drivers. Support for VK_EXT_graphics_pipeline_library highly recommended.

pc_minimum.Processor: Dual core from Intel or AMD at 2.8 GHz

mac_minimum.Graphics: Metal-capable GPU (AMD GCN-based GPU or newer, NVIDIA Kepler-based GPU or newer, Intel HD 4000 or newer)

linux_minimum.Processor: Dual core from Intel or AMD at 2.8 GHz
linux_minimum.Graphics: AMD GCN+, NVIDIA Kepler+, or Intel HD 5000-series or newer

pc_minimum.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 2GB / AMD Radeon R7 370 2GB

pc_recommended.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 3GB / AMD Radeon RX 580 4GB
